titleStmt.title: SII 27.407: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 407. (A.R. No. 157 of 1933-34.) KURIJILI, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North side of the boulder near the Veṇkatēśvara temple.

This record is a lease-deed of lands situated in the village of Guṇḍlahaḷi belonging to the temple of Kadiri Nārasiṁhadēva of Muḷuvāgila, excluding from them the area given as dasavanda, made ever by Viṭhaya and Kuppaya, son-in-law of Anantappa, the sthānikas of the temple, to Nārasiṁhadēva of Rāmasamudra.

It is dated the cyclic year Rudhirōdgārin, Jyēshṭha ba. 12, Wednesday. On palaeographical grounds, the record may be assigned to the 16th century when the details regularly correspond to 1503 A.D., June 21, which appears to be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . keṟeya gadeya sāgubaḷiya vōleya prati . rudrōdgāri saṁvatsarada jēṣṭha ba 12 bulū śrīmatu muḷu
vāgila kadiri nārasiṁhyadēvara sthānikaru viṭhayagaḷu Anaṁtappa voḍaṁbaṭṭu māḍida dharmada kramameṁteṁdoḍe beḷetaṁgaḍiya halara Anumatadiṁda māḍida dharmada vivara matyoṁ dalideyeṁba brahmadāyadalū gaḍu 40 ttaramū
bayalu yeraḍu Āḍakeya tōṭasahavāgi dadanu Akkihiḷiddu 30 hāni 30 Aṁgaḍiya hōlike baḷḷadalū Ā kṣētravabāḷi bahavanu naḍasikoḍuvanu
Digital edition of SII 27.407 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
